latin: Pupa bubulci parva ad novam pupam sideralem dixit: 'licet diversi simus, amicum in me habes.'

questions.target: Despite being different, they can be friends
choices: Despite being different, they can be friends
Only one can be the favorite

translation: The small cowboy toy said to the new space toy: 'Although we are different, you have a friend in me.'
